title: KMF III Services LLC Contractor Performance Records

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Tennessee Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting all public records related to KMF III Services LLC under RFP #92296 (Phil Keith Training Center), #94082 (Suttree Landing Park), and #105471 (Scattered Landscaping/Smart Fix 40), including: cure/default notices, withheld or disputed payments, invoice deductions, any written correspondence regarding performance deficiencies or quality failures, internal communications among KPD or Public Service staff regarding KMF III's compliance or service quality, and any records reflecting whether KMF III was renewed at contract expiration and the stated basis for that decision.
Please provide records in electronic format.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 7 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Kent Hoover, a citizen of Tennessee, in coordination with Drek Hawkins.

title: Public Records Request — AvaLawn Inc. Contractor Performance Records

communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Tennessee Public Records Act, I hereby request the following records:

I am requesting all public records related to AvaLawn, Inc. under RFP #99575 (Zone A), #99576 (Zone B), #99578 (Zone D), #99573 (I-40/JWP), #94082 (Suttree Landing Park), #93874 (Baker Creek), and #105471 (Scattered Landscaping/Smart Fix 40), including: cure/default notices, withheld or disputed payments, invoice deductions, any written correspondence regarding performance deficiencies or quality failures, and any internal communications among Public Service or Horticulture staff regarding AvaLawn's compliance or service quality.
Please provide records in electronic format.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 7 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Kent Hoover, a citizen of Tennessee, in coordination with Drek Hawkins.
